## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing functionality changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] All commits are signed off with `git commit -s` ([DCO](https://developercertificate.org/) compliance — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#developer-certificate-of-origin-dco))
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test` / `cargo test` / etc. — as applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior or API changed)
- [ ] No secrets / credentials / `.env` files committed
